user_prompt: Abstract dark presentation background for a technology intelligence dashboard. Deep navy blue to dark charcoal gradient. Subtle geometric mesh network with thin semi-transparent lines connecting scattered dim glowing nodes, concentrated toward the edges and corners, leaving the center area relatively clear for text. Faint data visualization aesthetics like barely visible concentric circles and radar sweep lines. Very subtle blue-teal accent glow at the bottom edge. Professional, corporate, modern. No text, no logos, no bright spots in center.
full_prompt:
Create a high-quality, professional image.

IMAGE QUALITY:
- High resolution, sharp details, no artifacts
- Professional lighting appropriate to the subject
- Accurate colors with natural tonal range
- Clean composition with clear focal point

COMPOSITION:
- Strong focal point that draws the eye
- Rule of thirds or intentional centered composition
- Appropriate depth of field for the subject
- Balanced visual weight across the frame
- Foreground/midground/background separation where appropriate

TECHNICAL EXCELLENCE:
- Accurate human anatomy (correct hands, proportions, faces)
- Physically plausible lighting and shadows
- Correct perspective and spatial relationships
- Natural material textures and surfaces

TEXT (if any text is part of the image):
- Spelled correctly with no garbled characters
- Legible font choice appropriate to the context
- Text integrated naturally into the scene
- Maximum 2 font families if text is prominent

CRITICAL — AVOID:
- Watermarks, signatures, or artist tags
- Extra fingers, distorted hands, or anatomical errors
- Blurry or out-of-focus main subject (unless intentionally bokeh)
- Unnatural skin tones or plastic-looking faces
- Text artifacts or nonsense characters
- Tiling artifacts or repeated patterns at edges


IMAGE CATEGORY: Texture / Pattern


TEXTURE / PATTERN REQUIREMENTS:
- High detail material surface rendering
- Consistent pattern repetition without obvious seams
- Physically accurate material properties (roughness, reflectivity, translucency)
- Appropriate scale for the material type
- Natural variation within the pattern (not perfectly robotic)
- Clean edges suitable for tiling if applicable
- Realistic wear, aging, or patina where appropriate



VISUAL STYLE: Minimalist / Clean

STYLE DIRECTION: Minimal clean design, ample negative space, simple geometric forms, Swiss/Bauhaus principles, elegant restraint.

COLOR DIRECTION: limited palette of 2-3 colors, strong negative space, monochromatic tendency


IMAGE SUBJECT AND CONTENT:
Abstract dark presentation background for a technology intelligence dashboard. Deep navy blue to dark charcoal gradient. Subtle geometric mesh network with thin semi-transparent lines connecting scattered dim glowing nodes, concentrated toward the edges and corners, leaving the center area relatively clear for text. Faint data visualization aesthetics like barely visible concentric circles and radar sweep lines. Very subtle blue-teal accent glow at the bottom edge. Professional, corporate, modern. No text, no logos, no bright spots in center.
